nodes.label: Tests for /reasoning show|hide slash command and show_thinking setting.  Covers:
show_thinking must appear in defaults and bool keys.
window._showThinking must be set in both the settings and fallback paths.
Historical thinking cards must be gated by window._showThinking.
Live streaming thinking card must be hidden when _showThinking is false.
cmdReasoning must be wired into COMMANDS with show/hide subArgs.
Regression: the api() helper spreads its 2nd arg into fetch(), so         passin
The effort-level set must match hermes_constants.VALID_REASONING_EFFORTS
Autocomplete subArgs must expose every CLI effort level + show/hide.
Validate that api/config.py exposes the CLI-parity helpers and that     they rea
Ensure our mirror stays in sync with hermes_constants.
set_reasoning_effort writes agent.reasoning_effort to the active         profile
set_reasoning_display writes display.show_reasoning to the same         config.y
When config.yaml has no display section, show_reasoning defaults         to True
Confirm api/streaming.py reads agent.reasoning_effort from config and     passes
